name: Advanced Flashcards WebAppServer
notes: 8.7.0 (build 60): Roll-up release with AI generator instruction overrides + per-deck helper UI toggles, live example preview, and stability fixes (List views rendering, JS init, Edit Deck back button sizing), AI Generator live example preview now matches AI Template; improved generator controls (Generate spacing/size, Preview All + Cancel, Clear); updated AI Template field dropdown.
